title: P8 Slice A ready for controller review
body: Arboreal Ripening Pollen reporting P8 Slice A ready. Claim ids: 64f3058d-6abb-484f-9f4b-84ee408f47c3 for snapshot.ts and tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts; b8a60bb2-f332-4b75-b54d-244b309e00f9 for extracted operator-value.ts after lint exposed the max-lines gate. Implemented operator_value on the collaboration TUI snapshot: recent_changes, ownership counts, queue_pressure, directed_thread_pressure, and needs_attention. TDD evidence: focused proof first failed on missing snapshot.operator_value, then passed with pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools exec vitest run tests/collaboration-state/tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts. Additional gates green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools type-check and pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools lint. P8-A4 advanced at snapshot/value-proxy level only; not claiming P8 complete and not touching app.tsx, panes.tsx, controller.ts, or tui-app.unit.test.ts.
